user.title: Connect to Fuse Energy
user.description: Enter your Fuse Energy account email address.

otp.title: Enter verification code
otp.description: Enter the code sent to your phone by Fuse Energy ({email}).

magic_link.title: Magic link verification
magic_link.description:
Fuse Energy sent a magic link to **{email}**.

1. Open the email on a **desktop browser**
2. Right-click the link → **Copy link address**
3. Paste the full URL below

URL looks like: `https://www.fuseenergy.com/app/sign-in/magic-link?token=...`

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Fuse Energy
reauth_confirm.description: Your session expired. Click Submit to send a new link to {email}.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid email, verification code, or magic link token.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach Fuse Energy API. Check that api.fuseenergy.com is not blocked by DNS/Pi-hole.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check HA logs for details.
error.no_premises: No premises found for this account.

abort.already_configured: This Fuse Energy account is already configured.
